llm_flavor: Mira — innkeeper of The Wandering Wolf. Warm hostess, keeps the place clean and the ale honest. Knows every traveler's name by their second visit.

tastes.reaction: "Oh, you DIDN'T. I'm cutting you the first slice."
"Tart little things. I'll fold them into a glaze."
"Bless you. The bards always ask for it before they sing."
Mira clutches it like a memory. "This one. THIS one stays on the shelf."
"Properly aged? Properly priced? You're a wonder."
"Pretty thing. I'll hang it over the bar."
"Bread keeps the patrons honest. Thank you."
"Soft light is half the welcome. Thank you."
"For the linens. The corner room is overdue."

disdains.reaction: "Get it OUT. I run a clean house."
"Dear gods, put it AWAY. Where do you find these things?"
